title: Better than WAILA
description: A "What Am I Looking At" type mod for Better than Adventure (A heavily modified version of beta 1.7.3)
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!_

_The name is a play on Better than Adventure and not a statement of superior quality when compared to the mod WAILA_

For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.

# About

Better than WAILA is a utility mod that displays additional information about what you are looking at.

Has plenty of customization options, and the positions of all elements can be adjusted inside the HUD editor.

See [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/btwaila/gallery) for how it looks ingame.

# Installation
This mod needs a specific [MultiMC/Prism](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo) instance to run and another other mod as a dependency:
- [HalpLibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/halplibe) by Turnip Labs
